author: doll-agent
content: Added scorer registry to scorer.rs: BUILTIN_SCORER_NAMES const, get_scorer (string name -> Scorer<f64>), get_scorer_names, check_scoring (accepts ScoringInput::{Name, Scorer}). 12 built-in regression scorers (neg_* loss family + r2 + explained_variance + neg poisson/gamma deviance). Added DistanceMetric trait to pairwise.rs (dyn-friendly with default distance() impl), Metric enum implements it.
